chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-8498 of 2017 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 25.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Khan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Mehran Khan, Assistant Advocate General a/w SHO-Waqar Azeem P.S. Soldier Bazar. ------------------ Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to the official respondents, inter alia, to remove unlawful obstructions/nuisance, containers, cemented bricks and barriers. It is alleged by the petitioner that she is residing within the jurisdiction of Police Station Soldier Bazar which is highly populated area. It is case of the petitioner that the streets described in paragraphs No.3&5 of the petition, are cordon off by the Soldier Bazar Police for approximately three years by installing barriers which are causing great inconvenience to the residents of the locality. Today, respondent No.4/SHO Police Station Soldier Bazar Karachi East has submitted comments, wherein it has been stated that Shia/Sunni/Ismailiy Communities on the following Islamic dates and on the occasions of the month’s of 21st Ramzan, (i) 8th (ii) 9th and (iii) 10 Muharram ul Harram, 20th Safar (Chehlum), 8th & 12th Rabi ul Awwal, Arrival of Agha Khan, Imamat Day, Birthday of Agha Khan, Chand Raat, Nowroz, the following roads/streets were blocked in the territorial limit of under command of Police Station Soldier Bazar in the larger interest of safety of human lives as well as properties:-

It is case of the petitioner that the streets described in paragraphs No.3&5 of the petition, are cordon off by the Soldier Bazar Police for approximately three years by installing barriers which are causing great inconvenience to the residents of the locality. Today, respondent No.4/SHO Police Station Soldier Bazar Karachi East has submitted comments, wherein it has been stated that Shia/Sunni/Ismailiy Communities on the following Islamic dates and on the occasions of the month’s of 21st Ramzan, (i) 8th (ii) 9th and (iii) 10 Muharram ul Harram, 20th Safar (Chehlum), 8th & 12th Rabi ul Awwal, Arrival of Agha Khan, Imamat Day, Birthday of Agha Khan, Chand Raat, Nowroz, the following roads/streets were blocked in the territorial limit of under command of Police Station Soldier Bazar in the larger interest of safety of human lives as well as properties:- S. No. NAMES OF ROADS/STREETS BLOCKED 01. Link Road start from M.A. Jinnah Road. 02. Mithibai Street. 03. Shahnawaz Bhutto Road. 04. Major Buckland Road. 05. Father Giminez Street. 06. Khare Ghat Road. 07. Mirza Khalij Beg Road. 08. Diyaram Ghidumal Road. 09. Madina Road. 10. General Richardson Road. 11. Nusarwanji Street. 12. Gulbai Street. 13. Rustamji street. 14. Narish Chandra Street. 15. Ashoka Street. Copy of the comments has been supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same and being satisfied does not press this petition further; however, he seeks directions for the respondent No.4 that aforementioned streets should not be blocked except for aforementioned dates and events to maintain law and order situation within the jurisdiction of Police Station Soldier Bazar. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Abrar
